title: Support safety blockers before structured SUPPORT overrides
files_not_modified: Stage33-F rule extraction (only a call site was added before proposed SUPPORT overrides are exported)

failure_modes_addressed.name: location_scope_mismatch
failure_modes_addressed.example_evidence: All users in the east district were reached.
failure_modes_addressed.example_claim: The verified users in the west district were reached.

failure_modes_addressed.name: exception_exclusion
failure_modes_addressed.example_evidence: All permits except the temporary permits were denied.

train_controlled_v6b_minimal.py.purpose: master switch to compute Stage36 blocker diagnostics; identical to Stage33-F when off
include stage36_* diagnostic fields in prediction exports
allow a fired blocker to replace the exported shadow label; never touches final logits/predictions

blocker_logic_summary.gating: Only fires when the proposed shadow label is SUPPORT. Never blocks REFUTE or NOT_ENTITLED. Never fires when the proposal is already the non-SUPPORT fallback_current_final label.
blocker_logic_summary.exception_blocker: Detects 'all X except Y ...' in evidence, extracts Y, and blocks if claim content-word overlap with Y is >= 0.6 of Y's content words. Does not block 'no X except Y' patterns.
blocker_logic_summary.not_all_existential_blocker: Detects 'not all/every X ...' in evidence and 'some X ...' in claim, blocks if claim subject overlaps >= 0.5 of the evidence subject's content words.
blocker_logic_summary.location_scope_blocker: Extracts location markers (district/zone/region/campus/warehouse/etc. with an adjacent direction or short identifier qualifier) from claim and evidence. Blocks only when both sides have the same marker with conflicting qualifiers.
blocker_logic_summary.temporal_scope_blocker: Extracts years (2020-2029), weekdays, quarters (Q1-Q4), and relative phrases (last year/this year/next year/today/yesterday/tomorrow). Blocks only when both sides have non-overlapping temporal markers.
blocker_logic_summary.action_on_fire: fallback_current_final replaces the shadow label with the current final classifier label (or NOT_ENTITLED if that is also SUPPORT); force_not_entitled always replaces with NOT_ENTITLED.

integration_point.location: scripts/train_controlled_v6b_minimal.py: prediction_records_v6b(), inside the per-record export loop, immediately after flatten_stage32_owner_state() fields are merged into the exported item and before exported.append(item)
integration_point.inputs_used: record claim/evidence text, the Stage32 composer_shadow proposed shadow_label/shadow_reason, the Stage33 structured_coverage route, and the current final classifier label (pred_label)
integration_point.output_written_to: item dict fields only (stage32_shadow_label / stage33_conditional_shadow_label overwritten only in shadow_mode; stage36_* diagnostic fields added only when export is enabled)

evaluator_changes.shadow_label_resolution: resolve_shadow_label() prefers stage36_final_shadow_label when present, else falls back to stage32_shadow_label/stage33_conditional_shadow_label (unchanged legacy behavior). resolve_shadow_label_original() prefers stage36_original_shadow_label for the pre-blocker view.
evaluator_changes.backward_compatibility: When no row carries stage36_support_blocker_fired, stage36_fields_present is false, no stage36_* keys are added to the report, and the existing Stage35 'decision' label is computed exactly as before (verified against a synthetic legacy predictions file with no stage36_* fields).

verification_performed.type: local unit-level smoke tests only (no Kaggle run, no training run)
checks: compute_stage36_support_safety_blocker() tested against the three Stage35-A failure-mode examples plus a non-target-subset exception case and a no-conflict control case; all fired/not-fired as expected
confirmed blockers never fire on proposed REFUTE labels and never fire when the master enabled flag is off

ran evaluate_stage35_adversarial_coverage.py end-to-end on a synthetic predictions file with stage36_* fields present: before/after counters and STAGE36A_SAFETY_BLOCKERS_EFFECTIVE decision matched expectations
ran evaluate_stage35_adversarial_coverage.py end-to-end on a synthetic legacy predictions file with no stage36_* fields: stage36_fields_present is false and no stage36_* keys appear in the report

remaining_risks: adv_numeric_support_recovered (0/25) is not addressed by Stage36-A and remains unresolved
passive/coordination SUPPORT recovery is unaffected by these blockers and likely still needs dedicated handling

heuristic word-overlap thresholds (0.6 for exception, 0.5 for not-all) are conservative but not exhaustive; --stage36-support-safety-shadow-mode may trade some SUPPORT recovery for safety and should be monitored via stage36_original_support_shadow_support vs stage36_post_support_shadow_support
all Stage35-A baseline numbers in this report are carried over from the previously reported Kaggle run; actual post-Stage36-A numbers require a fresh Kaggle validation run per task instructions
